_comment: Ticker-specific footnotes shown below the relevant table. Keyed by ticker, then by period (FYxxxx or FYxxxx-Qn), then concept. Render order: panel-level (no concept), then per-row.

FY2024-Q4.Net Income: One-time $10.2B tax charge from the EU State Aid decision (Apple v. Commission, Sept 2024). Excluding this item, normalized Q4 net income would be ~$24.9B.
